room.caption: [NightmareC3] This map in particular was a big problem with the old rules and was even revamped twice for them. It just never worked well.

instance.creationCode: x-=16 bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=112 newMapY=48 toRoom=rExtGateC_4 image_xscale=4 newArrowPosX=24 newArrowPosY=16
stringToShow="You can purify the beast, but only for a short while.#-WhattayaScryin'" signSize=2
